AFRL Inspire
Celebrating our people and our technologies that are changing the world for our Airmen, Guardians and society.
AFRL INSPIRE
AFRL Inspire is a celebration of the people and technologies that impact our Airmen, Guardians and society through a series of short, engaging, thought-provoking, and entertaining talks.

Related Topics
AFRL Inspire – 2022
On August 23, 2022 the 6th AFRL Inspire – inspired by the theme: “Accelerate, Innovate, Thrive” – was livestreamed from the Air Force Institute of Technology, WPAFB, Ohio. Enjoy the 2022 talks below.
AFRL professionals share inspirational talks during livestreamed event
WRIGHT-PATTERSON AIR FORCE BASE, Ohio (AFRL) -- The Air Force Research Laboratory hosted its sixth annual AFRL Inspire, the lab's TEDx-style event, at the Air Force Institute of Technology's Kenney Hall at Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, Aug. 23, 2022. Nine...
AFRL Inspire – 2021
On April 28, 2021 the 5th AFRL Inspire – a celebration of innovative ideas and passionate people – was livestreamed from the Air Force Institute of Technology, WPAFB, Ohio.
